text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm out shopping on a day off when I<n>come
across a group in a stir about<n>something.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Three whole boxes and we still<n>haven't got one...
Urk! My stomach<n>can't take any more...

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
King! Let's give up finding it<n>ourselves! Any more
and we're likely<n>to get sugar poisoning!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Gasp... I wouldn't dare make yousuffer that for me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
All right... Digital, I've decided to take<n>you up on
that trade you offered.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hweee! Thank you so kindly for<n>accepting! Or I
mean, I'm really sorry<n>to have bothered you out of
nowhere!

text_block_list.name: Bob-cut Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
No, no, you're actually helping us out.<n>No matter
how much we eat, we just<n>can't find King's card.
We're at the<n>end of our rope.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I-i-is that so? Well, I'm used to eating<n>tons of
chocolate, so just leave it to<n>me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
When you buy mountains of<n>chocolate like I do,
you get tons of<n>duplicates. I'm sure I'll get a few
of<n>King!
choice_data_list: What are you guys talking about?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if it isn't Trainer! Hehe, we're<n>talking about
Umamusume chocolate<n>eggs! King and her friends
came here<n>to buy some too.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume chocolate eggs... Oh, it<n>must be those
egg-shaped<n>chocolates that come with an
Umamusume figure inside.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I gave them permission to use<n>my likeness
in the latest series!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
A-a-about that, King! I'll check which<n>ones I get
right away and then<n>message you!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huff, wheeze! I can't believe I getto actually do something useful formy oshi!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Today's gonna be the unboxing of<n>the century! No
holds barred! I'll order<n>twenty ten-egg boxes and
bust all of<n>'em open at once!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Guehehe... Drool... Looking at all thewonderful figures as I eat, thischocolate's gonna taste diviiine... ♪
choice_data_list: Try not to eat too much, okay?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hm, you're right! Putting on too much<n>weight will
interfere with my sacred<n>races...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll keep a number of chocolates<n>aside and eat
them in moderation.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm normally happy with whoever I<n>get, but just
this time, I'm hoping for<n>lots and lots of Kings. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, Agnes Digital rushes home<n>with an armful
of chocolate egg<n>boxes.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Can do! I just gotta sort out some<n>drinks that go
well with chocolate<n>now! ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Guehehe! Tonight, I feast!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, Agnes Digital heads home<n>gasping in
anticipation.
